package rulefixtures

import (
	"sync"
)

// scenario for race_on_shared_map: map reads/writes from multiple goroutines without mutex or `sync.Map` protection (detect goroutine launches + shared map access patterns)
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario729Negative(items []string) map[string]int {
	counts := map[string]int{}
	var mu sync.Mutex
	var wg sync.WaitGroup
	for _, item := range items {
		wg.Add(1)
		go func(value string) { defer wg.Done(); mu.Lock(); counts[value]++; mu.Unlock() }(item)
	}
	wg.Wait()
	return counts
}
